title: cyclosorus angustifolius
intro: Cyclosorus angustifolius, also known as the Narrow-leaved Lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Cyclosorus angustifolius include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cyclosorus angustifolius are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
